svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(235, 245, 251), rgb(20, 29, 34)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 130, 200), rgb(52, 164, 224));
fill: light-dark(rgb(235, 245, 251), rgb(20, 29, 34)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 130, 200), rgb(52, 164, 224));
fill: light-dark(rgb(235, 245, 251), rgb(20, 29, 34)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 130, 200), rgb(52, 164, 224));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 117px; margin-left: 656px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333; background-color: #ffffff;

display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); white-space: nowrap;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 130, 200), rgb(52, 164, 224)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 130, 200), rgb(52, 164, 224));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(245, 238, 248), rgb(34, 28, 36)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(107, 46, 158), rgb(214, 161, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(254, 249, 239), rgb(27, 23, 14)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(255, 153, 0), rgb(175, 87, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 616px; margin-left: 170px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#666666, #959595); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;
